author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text: The #JS #IPFS page is now translated to 🇨🇳 Chinese https://js.ipfs.io/zh-CN in addition to English, Polski, Italiano, Nederlands, Dansk, Français, Português and 한국어 ! Big thank you to the #IPFS Community for contributing with translations, making the website more accessible ❤️
